blocks.text: Combination Correct the outside temperature display if the meter or outside temperature sensor has been replaced or if correction is required.

Turn ignition to ON mode. Use the SEL/RESET switch to display the outside temperature. Cool the outside temperature sensor (A) as follows: make sure that the entire display flashes 10 times only when the outside temperature display first shows 4°C or higher to 3°C or lower. Check whether the outside temperature display matches the thermometer (B), and if not, go to step 2.

While the outside temperature is displayed, hold down the SEL/RESET switch for at least 10 seconds, check that the outside temperature display changes as follows, and release the hand from the SEL/RESET switch at the correction value for the deviation from the thermometer. Check that the outside temperature display matches the thermometer. If they do not match, perform the correction again.
